dict.string: BuneIOS needs camera access to scan METRC barcode tags on packages during pickup and delivery.
Your location is used to record pickup and delivery stops on active transport manifests and share live trip progress with the dispatcher.

Background location is used only while a transport manifest is active, so dispatchers and regulators can verify the vehicle's route as required by METRC chain-of-custody rules. Tracking pauses automatically when the trip ends.
